title: Disc Crafting
description: Adds balanced recipes to all 18 uncraftable music discs, requiring you to explore the world.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fa2e682109e7d9f3689a1dc148513d6e8f54210.png)

This data pack adds balanced recipes to all uncraftable music discs. Each music disc requires a few pieces of iron, a key item, and a bottle o' enchanting. All key items are completely different, requiring you to explore the whole world. All recipes are also unlockable like in vanilla.

## Main Recipe
![Showcase Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ef88e24e7007d7786f4f6ee0139a2f97563825d_0.webp)
The key item goes into the empty space in the middle.

## Key Items
- **13:** Sunflower
- **Cat:** Short Grass
- **Blocks:** Redstone Dust
- **Chirp:** Redstone Block
- **Far:** Kelp
- **Mall:** Breeze Rod (Cornflower for 1.20.6 and Below)
- **Mellohi:** Amethyst Shard
- **Stal:** Coal
- **Strad:** Sugar
- **Ward:** Vines
- **11:** Wither Rose
- **Creator (Music Box):** Honeycomb
- **Wait:** Diamond
- **Creator:** Twisting Vines
- **Precipice:** Prismarine Shard
- **Otherside:** Echo Shard
- **Relic:** Nether Star
- **Pigstep:** Netherite Scrap
